title: The king gets a television (and a wii) (nintendobrad's account is closed)
description:
I uploaded this because for some reason nintendobrad's account is closed

nintendobrad's original description: The King is bored, so he turns on the TV and watches random crap. Then those Wii guys come and give The King a Wii! What will happen? Get ready to be surprised!

My first poop containing only King Harkinian. Ladies and gentleman, this is the first time The King uses his powerful Dinner Attack.

( not my honors, honors to nintendobrad)
